content.markdown: The concept of a *local network gateway* in Azure Stack is a bit different than in an Azure deployment.
content.text: The concept of a *local network gateway* in Azure Stack is a bit different than in an Azure deployment.

content.markdown: in Azure Stack is a bit different than in an Azure deployment.

content.markdown: In an Azure deployment, a local network gateway represents an on-premises (at the user location) physical device that you connect to a virtual network gateway in Azure. However, in Azure Stack both ends of the connection are virtual network gateways.
